sentences.arabic: اشْتُهِرَ أَمِيرُ المُؤْمِنِينَ عُمَرُ بْنُ الخَطَّابِ، رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ، بِعَدْلِهِ الشَّدِيدِ وَتَقْوَاهُ الوَاضِحَةِ الَّتِي جَعَلَتْهُ نَمُوذَجًا فَرِيدًا فِي القِيَادَةِ وَالحُكْمِ الرَّاشِدِ.
sentences.translation: Vođa pravovjernih, Omer ibn el-Hattab, radijallahu anhu, bio je poznat po svojoj strogoj pravdi i jasnoj bogobojaznosti, što ga je učinilo jedinstvenim modelom vođstva i pravedne vladavine.
sentences.translationEn: The Commander of the Faithful, Umar ibn al-Khattab, may Allah be pleased with him, was famous for his rigorous justice and clear piety, which made him a unique model of leadership and guided governance.

sentences.arabic: وَيُرْوَى عَنْهُ أَنَّهُ كَانَ يَتَفَقَّدُ الرَّعِيَّةَ فِي سَوَادِ اللَّيْلِ لِيَطْمَئِنَّ عَلَى أَحْوَالِهِمْ، خَوْفًا مِنْ أَنْ يَسْأَلَهُ اللهُ عَنْ أَيِّ تَقْصِيرٍ فِي حَقِّهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Prenosi se da je obilazio podanike u gluho doba noći kako bi se uvjerio u njihovo stanje, bojeći se da ga Allah ne pita za bilo kakav propust prema njima.
sentences.translationEn: It is narrated of him that he used to check on his subjects in the darkness of the night to be reassured of their conditions, fearing that Allah would question him about any shortcoming toward them.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِأَنَّ المَسْؤُولِيَّةَ أَمَانَةٌ ثَقِيلَةٌ تَتَطَلَّبُ السَّهَرَ عَلَى رَاحَةِ المُسْتَضْعَفِينَ وَإِنْصَافِ المَظْلُومِينَ مَهْمَا كَانَتْ مَكَانَتُهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Vjerovao je da je odgovornost težak emanet koji zahtijeva bdijenje nad udobnošću potlačenih i davanje prava obespravljenima, bez obzira na njihov položaj.
sentences.translationEn: He believed that responsibility is a heavy trust that requires staying awake for the comfort of the oppressed and ensuring justice for the wronged, regardless of their status.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي مَوْقِفٍ يَدُلُّ عَلَى زُهْدِهِ، رَفَضَ عُمَرُ التَّنَعُّمَ بِمَلَذَّاتِ الدُّنْيَا بَيْنَمَا كَانَ بَعْضُ المُسْلِمِينَ يُعَانُونَ مِنَ الفَقْرِ، مُؤَكِّدًا أَنَّ الحَاكِمَ يَجِبُ أَنْ يَكُونَ آخِرَ مَنْ يَشْبَعُ.
sentences.translation: U situaciji koja ukazuje na njegov zuhd (skromnost), Omer je odbio uživati u dunjalučkim blagodatima dok su neki muslimani patili od siromaštva, naglašavajući da vladar mora biti posljednji koji će se zasititi.
sentences.translationEn: In a situation demonstrating his asceticism, Umar refused to indulge in worldly pleasures while some Muslims were suffering from poverty, emphasizing that the ruler must be the last one to be satiated.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةَ العَطِرَةَ تُعَلِّمُنَا أَنَّ القُوَّةَ فِي الحَقِّ لَا تَتَعَارَضُ مَعَ الرَّحْمَةِ، وَأَنَّ العَدْلَ هُوَ أَسَاسُ المُلْكِ وَاسْتِقْرَارِ المُجْتَمَعَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ova mirisna biografija uči nas da snaga u istini nije u suprotnosti s milošću, te da je pravda temelj vlasti i stabilnosti društava.
sentences.translationEn: This fragrant biography teaches us that strength in truth does not conflict with mercy, and that justice is the foundation of sovereignty and the stability of societies.

sentences.arabic: فَمَنْ سَارَ عَلَى نَهْجِ الفَارُوقِ فِي نَزَاهَتِهِ وَإِخْلَاصِهِ، اسْتَحَقَّ أَنْ يُخَلِّدَ التَّارِيخُ ذِكْرَهُ كَمَنَارَةٍ لِلْحَقِّ وَالقِسْطِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Ko god bude slijedio put El-Faruka u njegovoj čestitosti i iskrenosti, zaslužuje da mu historija ovjekovječi spomen kao svjetioniku istine i pravičnosti među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: Whoever follows the path of al-Faruq in his integrity and sincerity deserves for history to immortalize his memory as a beacon of truth and equity among people.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنْ عُمَرُ يَخْشَى فِي اللهِ لَوْمَةَ لَائِمٍ، بَلْ كَانَ وَقَّافًا عِنْدَ حُدُودِ الشَّرْعِ.
sentences.translation: Omer se u ime Allaha nije bojao ničijeg prijekora, već se strogo pridržavao šerijatskih granica.
sentences.translationEn: Umar did not fear the blame of any critic for the sake of Allah; rather, he strictly adhered to the limits of the Sharia.

sentences.arabic: وَبِهَذَا، نَسْتَنْتِجُ أَنَّ القِيَادَةَ الحَقِيقِيَّةَ هِيَ الَّتِي تَمْزُجُ بَيْنَ الهَيْبَةِ وَالتَّوَاضُعِ لِأَجْلِ مَصْلَحَةِ الأُمَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Iz ovoga zaključujemo da je istinsko vođstvo ono koje spaja autoritet i poniznost radi interesa ummeta.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, we conclude that true leadership is that which blends prestige with humility for the sake of the Ummah's interest.

sentences.arabic: فَرَحِمَ اللهُ الفَارُوقَ الَّذِي أَعَزَّ اللهُ بِهِ الإِسْلَامَ وَأَقَامَ بِهِ مِيزَانَ العَدْلِ.
sentences.translation: Allah se smilovao El-Faruku, preko kojeg je Allah uzdigao islam i uspostavio vagu pravde.
sentences.translationEn: May Allah have mercy on al-Faruq, through whom Allah strengthened Islam and established the scale of justice.
